completed: Drafted the L2 conditional moment lemma for the constructive heterogeneity model without a normality assumption.
Added a separate conditional-joint-Gaussian corollary for the distributional conclusion.
Recorded the required conditional zero-covariance and joint-Gaussianity conditions as proposed, decision-gated assumptions.
Updated T-003 in the theorem backlog without promoting C-003.
why_it_matters: The moment lemma isolates the exact condition under which omitted context adds gamma-squared times v(z) to conditional latent variance.
The corollary prevents the project from inferring a Gaussian latent law from moment conditions alone.

checks_run.name: git diff --check
checks_run.notes: No whitespace errors in the proof, registry, backlog, or structured-update changes.

checks_run.name: python3 scripts/validate_research_update.py logs/research_updates/2026-07-10T052915Z_gaussian-constructive-heterogeneity.json schemas/research_update.schema.json
checks_run.notes: Validated this cycle report against the project schema.

checks_run.name: make validate-update
checks_run.notes: Validated the repository example structured update using the Makefile target.

checks_run.name: cd formal && lake build
checks_run.notes: Built the existing Lean scaffold; this proof draft adds no Lean theorem.

checks_run.name: make smoke, make synthetic-raid, make test
checks_run.notes: Not run because this is a documentation-only theorem proof draft with no simulation, empirical-data, or executable-model change.

decision_needed.question: Should T-003 retain A-007 conditional zero covariance and A-008 conditional joint Gaussianity as its proposed assumption package before proof-critic review?
options: Approve the proposed package for proof-critic review.
Require conditional independence instead of the minimal zero-covariance condition.
Keep T-003 decision-gated pending a different constructive specification.
decision_needed.default_if_no_response: Keep T-003 decision-gated and do not promote C-003.

procedure_compliance.notes: The proof is conditional and decision-gated. No estimand, false-complex model choice, literature claim, causal claim, restricted RAID data, expensive computation, or claim-status promotion was added.

risks_or_uncertainties: A-003, A-007, and A-008 remain unapproved; the proof must not be used as accepted manuscript evidence.
The result proves a conditional variance identity, not KL dominance or false-complex model selection.
next_bounded_task: Obtain a PI/theorem decision on A-007 and A-008, then send the L2 draft for proof-critic review.
